summary: Frontend-only testing completed for 3 new billing UI features. All 10 test cases PASSED (100%). Tested: Plan Upgrade Modal, Usage Meter, Credits Badge in navbar. All features working as expected.

credits_badge: Credits badge [data-testid='credits-badge'] visible in top navbar
Shows '100 left' for new user on free plan
plan_upgrade_modal: Modal opens when clicking 'Upgrade Plan' button [data-testid='upgrade-plan-btn']
All 4 plans displayed: Free (₹0), Starter (₹499), Growth (₹1,999), Enterprise (Custom)
'Current Plan' badge shown on Free tier for new users
'Most Popular' badge shown on Growth plan
subscribe_button_mocked: Shows toast: 'Plan upgrade to starter initiated! Payment integration coming soon.' (MOCKED)
support_link: Support link visible in sidebar with mailto:support@extractai.in

critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
Usage meter correctly fetches subscription data from /api/subscription
Plan pricing correctly displayed with proper formatting (₹1,999 not ₹1999)
seed_data_creation: New test user created during Playwright testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend billing UI features fully tested and working. Plan Upgrade Modal is MOCKED - subscribe button shows toast message instead of real payment flow. Usage meter shows 0/100 extractions for new free tier users. Credits badge in navbar shows remaining extractions.

mocked_apis.subscribe_buttons: Shows toast 'Plan upgrade to [plan] initiated! Payment integration coming soon.' - real Razorpay integration pending
mocked_apis.enterprise_contact: Opens mailto:sales@extractai.in instead of payment flow

features_verified.plan_upgrade_modal: WORKING - Opens, shows 4 plans, close via X and backdrop
features_verified.usage_meter: WORKING - Shows X/Y extractions with progress bar
features_verified.credits_badge: WORKING - Shows remaining extractions in navbar
